altText: A tall tulip poplar tree with green leaves growing in a grassy park.
Green tulip poplar leaves with four points and a flat top.
Tulip poplar leaves with pointy lobes against a blue sky.
Young tulip poplar plants with flat-topped leaves on the forest floor.
A green and orange tulip poplar flower lying next to its leaves.
A cup-shaped tulip poplar flower with an orange band inside.
Yellow-green tulip poplar flowers blooming high up among the leaves.
Many shiny green tulip poplar leaves with a few flowers on the tree.
